title: Portuguese Paella with Grilled Fish
description: A traditional Portuguese-inspired paella dish with the addition of grilled fish for extra flavor.
instructions: 1. Heat the grassy olive oil in a large paella pan over medium-high heat.
2. Add the Portuguese chorizo and cook until browned, about 2-3 minutes.
3. Add the chopped onion and minced garlic and cook until softened, about 3-4 minutes.
4. Add the halved cherry tomatoes and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
5. Add the smoked paprika, salt, and black pepper and stir to combine.
6. Add the paella rice and stir to coat with the oil and spice mixture.
7. Add 2 cups of water to the pan and bring to a boil.
8. Reduce heat to low and simmer, covered, for 20 minutes or until the rice is tender.
9. Meanwhile, grill the fish fillets over medium heat until cooked through, about 4-5 minutes per side.
10. To serve, place the cooked paella on a large platter and top with the grilled fish fillets.
